title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Expeditors India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Expeditors India
jsonLd.description:
Expeditors India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Logistics Manager at our Mumbai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Expeditors India:
Expeditors India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Expeditors India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
